overview: QuickCart is a pixel-perfect React clone of the Zepto grocery delivery website, rebranded with a modern purple design. It features a hero carousel, category tabs with full-bleed images, 120+ product cards, cart management, and a complete payment flow with UPI/Card/NetBanking/COD options.
features: Hero carousel with auto-sliding banners and dot indicators
Category tabs with full-bleed product images
Product detail modal with large image and full info
Cart sidebar with quantity steppers and total summary
Complete payment flow: UPI (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm, BHIM), Card, Net Banking, COD
Order success confirmation with order ID and delivery time
Plain JSX only — no TypeScript, minimal file count
